name: CloudSSH
desc: Serverless Web SSH client built on Cloudflare Workers with a pure TypeScript SSH stack, multi-session terminals, SFTP file management, and an AI operations ass…
descFull: Serverless Web SSH client built on Cloudflare Workers with a pure TypeScript SSH stack, multi-session terminals, SFTP file management, and an AI operations assistant. 基于 Cloudflare Workers 的无服务器 Web SSH 客户端，支持多会话终端、SFTP 文件管理与 AI 运维助手。
